history.historicalImportance: Begusarai has historical importance due to its association with ancient Mithila region and its role in Bihar's political and cultural development.
history.formationHistory: Begusarai was constituted as a separate district on 2 October 1972 after being carved out of Munger district.
history.freedomMovement: People of Begusarai actively participated in the Indian freedom movement through protests, public meetings, and the Quit India Movement of 1942.
history.archaeologicalImportance: Begusarai district has archaeological sites that provide evidence of ancient settlements and the region's historical heritage.

geography.location: Begusarai district is situated in the central part of Bihar, on the northern bank of the Ganga River.

boundaries.south: Lakhisarai, Patna and the Ganga River

geography.climate: Tropical monsoon climate with hot summers, a rainy monsoon season, and cool winters.
